Transfusion Post-admit Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received transfusions within the last 14 days while a resident of this facility. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
^=Blank (skip pattern) discontinued 09/30/2023
495 O0100J1_DLYS_PRIOR_CD O0100J1_DLYS_PRIOR_CD O0100J1 Special Treatments/Programs: Dialysis Pre-admit Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received dialysis within the last 14 days
